data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifying user choices to enhance decision-making speed.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist design approach, reduced navigation options.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizing user interface elements to improve accessibility and ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Larger clickable areas, accessible touch targets.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Implementation of visual hierarchy and grouping for improved user comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Use of contrast, alignment, and proximity.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design consistency with popular platforms to meet user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Adherence to interface standards, familiarity in design language.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Elements close to each other are perceived as related, aiding in intuitive navigation.
data.technical_spec: Logical grouping of menu items, clustered icons.
